subject: An unholy alliance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
The Democratic Party and Big Tech are joining forces to suppress YOUR VOICE | | | | | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
Have you heard about what is brewing?

An unholy alliance between the Democratic Party and Big Tech companies is putting your right to free speech in grave danger. **[WE HAVE TO FIGHT BACK!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=82e0a96e63&e=fdefed58de)**
We’ve already learned so much about how social media giants like Twitter suppressed potential election-changing information in 2020, and covered for President Biden’s son.

Your right to free speech is **UNDER ATTACK** by Silicon Valley Oligarchs and the corrupt Democratic Regime.
_ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!_
**[If this country stands a snowball’s chance in hell of making it through the destructive Biden era, it’s going to be because patriots like you stepped up and fought tooth and nail to take our country back.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=96af7111ab&e=fdefed58de)**
---
| | [**FIGHT BACK WITH $25**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c22a36539c&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you for stepping up,

GOP Rapid Response

I’ll tell you — walk around the capitol for a minute, and sometimes you might forget you’re at the center of our nation’s government. Socialist wokers in Washington are happy to welcome more followers to the hive mind. Collectively, Friend, I’d be willing to bet you've got more experience than the entire office of one of my colleagues. As you can imagine, we’ve got a tough road in front of us. There’s never any shortage of liberals in Washington, but trust me when I tell you, it’s getting a little egregious. | Best, Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. clean_body: _ Friend, The Biden Administration has weaponized the Department of Justice. This horrendous abuse of power is the latest in a long series of WITCH HUNTS. Now that I have announced I am running for PRESIDENT of the United States, the corrupt and highly political Justice Department just appointed a radical Left Special Counsel, made up of Trump-haters. We cannot let them get away with this, Friend. We cannot let this happen to our Country. I am one of the most honest and innocent people ever in our Country. They have found NOTHING. I'm calling on my most LOYAL and steadfast supporters to STAND WITH ME against this HOAX. I need YOU to get on the team as an AMERICAN DEFENDER and tell the Left that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. I've been going through these hoaxes and scams ever since the day I took my famous escalator ride in Trump Tower in 2015. THIS HAS TO END. Our Country is the laughingstock of the World, and Joe Biden is a corrupt and incompetent political hack. I know you agree, Friend, and this is your chance to publicly show where you stand! I'll review a list with the names of the proud Patriots who rushed in their support, and I want to see YOUR name at the TOP. Thank you, Donald J. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053116:6Akp1VGNW:m:1:3253819041:CCB7F5FE6CCBDD5F5AF4384850CA001C:r)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053116:6Akp1VGNW:m:1:3253819041:CCB7F5FE6CCBDD5F5AF4384850CA001C:r)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, **we need more faith-driven leaders.**

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053116:6Akp1VGNW:m:1:3253819041:CCB7F5FE6CCBDD5F5AF4384850CA001C:r)
---

If you agree, _**[please consider donating today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053116:6Akp1VGNW:m:1:3253819041:CCB7F5FE6CCBDD5F5AF4384850CA001C:r "please consider donating today")**_ to help me bring put Christian conservatism back in government.

God Bless,

I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book. | Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day. Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating. If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, we need more faith-driven leaders. | | If you agree, "please consider donating today" to help me bring put Christian conservatism back in government. God Bless, | Mike Pompeo | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 | | "Mike Pompeo Is Calling on All Conservatives to Join Him in Championing Our American Values" | A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO It's Christmastime and I've got a special gift that your friends and family will love. "Claim your CAVPAC Christmas bundle before we run out of stock!" Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! name: Roger R. Ream
subject: Educate Tomorrow's Leaders
body:
Friend, If you care about our country, our world, you're probably just as concerned as I am. Our nation is divided.....
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ1LTJhYTBkZjUyYWU2MzQzYmJhMjdkNzU2Y2M2ZjcwZGI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvenV5dXR5YXczeD9zcmM9RkZPMzM1MDAifQ/-i0sPdvTlMQvbiRTDK96qw)

Friend,If you care about our country, our world, you're probably just as concerned as I am.

Our nation is **_divided_**. Our values are under **_attack_**. Our leaders are seemingly **_inadequate for the challenges that face us all._** [BUT YOU CAN HELP CHANGE ALL OF THAT NOW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ1LTJhYTBkZjUyYWU2MzQzYmJhMjdkNzU2Y2M2ZjcwZGI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvenV5dXR5YXczeD9zcmM9RkZPMzM1MDAifQ/E_7Kt1ztoSVTCOwUTuE5aQ) **The Fund for American Studies (TFAS)** inspires young, **courageous****future leaders to make a difference** in their communities and throughout the world by upholding the values essential to the preservation and success of a free society. TFAS offers **transformational programs that teach the principles of****limited government****,****free-market economics****and****honorable leadership** to students and young professionals in America and around the world. [HELP THESE STUDENTS OF TODAY BECOME THE LEADERS OF TOMORROW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ1LTJhYTBkZjUyYWU2MzQzYmJhMjdkNzU2Y2M2ZjcwZGI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvenV5dXR5YXczeD9zcmM9RkZPMzM1MDAifQ/wxNDMv3o_3RWE0GDDFlhNA)
To win over each new generation to the ideas of individual **liberty, personal responsibility, and economic freedom** , TFAS works tirelessly towards nothing less than **a restoration of faith in what men and women can accomplish****when they are free****and have the opportunity to thrive.

** The mission of TFAS, its board, staff and our thousands of supporters is to **develop courageous leaders inspired and equipped to protect and advance** the ideas of individual liberty, personal responsibility, and economic freedom **in their communities and throughout the world**.
---
| [**Support TFAS Today**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ1LTJhYTBkZjUyYWU2MzQzYmJhMjdkNzU2Y2M2ZjcwZGI2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvenV5dXR5YXczeD9zcmM9RkZPMzM1MDAifQ/A1yE9O-c0l0X5jHH-W_waw)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z007p58geh0ita16p0no0m32dpfjqi46c0nn5muo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqdpr3kic4ngak4u1s4s5la2kfnf4dbhpfesqq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6clh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z20t6nks0ihd4r8ba78h7ffvlrrf8mo7manv86g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6clh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they’re doing to our kids?
body:
We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7508%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=d6j70qAfFAKlALyooR5idg&sysid=1)
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96170%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BSQ84J33pa9HWgRpi7BFtg&sysid=1) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96171%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r9x8WE3jwRwyX1wh0AmZWg&sysid=1) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kDxHA%2bBcehTM2sfp4M1OmQ&sysid=1) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits - we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r5%2b36ZdkVCd3v9%2bYujRcYA&sysid=1) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---
| | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped - and making the schools and individual “teachers” pay is the only way! That’s why I’m asking you to join our critical lawsuit today. [**Please, follow this link to make your****best tax-deductible donation of $20,****$35, $50, $100, $250 or more.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96174%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nYoY8yShgsiI1wmVByit7Q&sysid=1)

clean_body: We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on Laura Ingraham ’s great Fox News show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”. These people are not real teachers. They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read... They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic... They’re not concerned with teaching history... They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit The Ingraham Angle , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold them accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits - we WIN them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon | | | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped - and making the schools and individual “teachers” pay is the only way! body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj3deu2t0gcqjq8ridstbgs4dk8apviincvgs1ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6c3h2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!

of FREE gifts!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8sprqavqojr15pp1al3g8s0tls40stsmeq1cc28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6c3h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znhuegqh36bev43fl180ptvq85hhdajt8o6mate8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6c3h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkf53g110ofuftd6tqflkuak6he5rf890ldl97s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6c3h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2ov2c993u0shoc7eh3dchd7qghde7bdsntfer0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6c3h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgrjq9brhcq0cdrk9b3i15f3u3hk0giggmn6aei0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6c3h2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates

name: American Briefing
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7pfte66babkgeakmv9a26or3ukdd5grves2kjbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z02geprkji0hi3lrq88e2tj78rlbbck9k4qbp5do_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim6ob6clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zagqnd3he9m3sed33cqra3nv4r9j2k4tv34f9120_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7c43eqc617tegdc2kcb57op6vo44fnj2jupd30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9r6vvnha3ttepf7due1j2oqp1hlq4onfaq29t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4e9ibj4mhlmvb96rkj4lte5ucel7l1ijm5qaego_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdq03r1utb1b1kcauer7q0o7atv8gdnlq0mkfco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2b5vbn0b0leucbj1s5q9fjbrl09djokjhs2dv80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5l2n60v01g0b0gj3puh293tko8hjd4aqa8baog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdhm7li2i80pnlomcchg48s0qit0tfj182ui6cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn55cgtairkk07lq8inhfnkemfiivgmc01ocg80g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj2chh2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: ICYMI News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3vkif40f8tdlgd56qe2rmvuqhu36iei0cusohh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3v0lroevdlg9e42bgm79qltn7otm1c23p64a9rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj4c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdote4fkcpm50uph83avuiv4s859strjeckalmrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj4c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrjg0jl2bln5f9pemp0skjg5dghv13unfn4thebo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctim1oj4c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: SmartAsset
subject: 7 Mistakes People Make When Hiring a Financial Advisor
body:
A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 2
**Choosing a financial advisor is a major decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come.**

A 2020 [Northwestern Mutual study](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zonu7p5pc3rvugdifbsjqhgngkm9hgubrnmrkih8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm0o32c5h2bs) found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.

The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.

A recent [Vanguard study](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgq2gb5d6dcdmu5hro9j2aoavdrl6c5jcr3h6rho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm0o32c5h2bs) found that, on average, a $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.

SmartAsset’s no-cost tool simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three local fiduciary financial advisors, each legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an expert for a free retirement consultation.

Being aware of these seven common blunders when [choosing an advisor](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7h59gdc48fameg3vpcbl18dka0uakbro50iej60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm0o32c5h2bs) can help you find peace of mind, and avoid years of stress.

**1\. Hiring an Advisor Who Is Not a Fiduciary**
By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person’s best interest. This obligation eliminates conflict of interest concerns and makes an advisor’s advice more trustworthy.

All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset’s matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, [use this no-cost tool](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z95qa7tcv7vi4u0aabv19mkq79b8gl2ud63m3248_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm0o32c5h2bs) to find an advisor who has your best interest in mind.

**2\. Hiring the First Advisor You Meet**
While it’s tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you.

**3\. Choosing an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty**
Some financial advisors specialize in retirement planning, others are better for business owners or those with a high net worth, and some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor’s strengths and weaknesses – before signing on the dotted line.

**4\. Picking an Advisor With an Incompatible Strategy**
Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style.

**5\. Not Asking About Credentials**
To give investment advice, financial advisors are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests and credentials. Some advisors are Certified Financial Planners.

**6\. Not Understanding How They are Paid**
Some advisors are “fee only” and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them.

**7\. Trying to Hire an Advisor on Your Own**
Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one.

SmartAsset’s no-cost tool makes it easy to [find a qualified financial advisor](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsh9sg5j6vlnsqf87p7dvksctt7189tn4io2j7bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm0o32c5h2bs). Just answer a few questions about your financial situation and then you can compare up to three advisors local to you, and decide which to work with. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes, and there is absolutely no obligation to work with any of your matches.

[Find your financial advisor match today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl3v9u914te1d9o9adl1uf9ul6o5mns7lg29fqjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm0o32c5h2bs).

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z71uiikhc9i8v3c32fq3k9hj1oadvr189ak3q1qg).

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications ...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancee, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77324%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fp20tFOqxq3y4HxwORlA%2bw&sysid=1)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77335%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3zP7IOCBrzy4U6v9oLc%2fOw&sysid=1)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77336%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=THrvioJujVopzjs3%2fMxrBg&sysid=1)

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. name: American Action News
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrefvp6cv4r14iub4vlmddvdv4k7i3jubaefu7t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm8o72c1h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And [what she's discovered is startling.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg30aof6tkfce9tdssglsofac1l6eh6dpm3ulqsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm8o72c1h2bs) It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0l5t1l2ml93731ug9rfkpo57im6u6ju26io593g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm8o72c1h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztb5gaucgusqeq4tkjo4v0q6t50qn5v3tkiuc0go_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm8o72c1h2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0260%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=in6EWfUxBVygWHcWVS%2bJjA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42398%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GCSdJQI6zxMsd5HUs8SOWg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42399%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1K%2f7Zb%2fGCebtV9M08RNd7w&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42399%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1K%2f7Zb%2fGCebtV9M08RNd7w&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Doug Stewart
subject: Burning the world to “save” it
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053141:6OGjmVGwN:m:1:3253819041:DAB91798537C64D12595710006D72CCE:r)
Peter,

Woke social justice warriors have been worming their way into every part of our culture:
* Federal government
* Schools and colleges
* The Media

And now the Church.

These woke fanatics use manipulative tactics designed to undermine the free society that built our nation. **And they 're hell-bent on "saving" the world through aggression. **

Conservatives and libertarians need Christianity to build an honest society.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Doug Stuart, CEO of the Libertarian Christian Institute (LCI). We are making the Christian case for free people and free markets.

That's why I've set a goal to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to help us advocate for a world where Christians promote the values and principles of a free society.

[_**Will you please consider giving LCI a generous gift today and help us reach our goal? Click here to support our important mission >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053141:6OGjmVGwN:m:1:3253819041:DAB91798537C64D12595710006D72CCE:r)

We can't look towards these new woke ideologies to replace our longing for Christ.

Christianity is the way, Peter.

The Bible does not tell us to look for the government to take care of us -- instead, we are to look to Christ.

A limited government aligns with Biblical principles.

And LCI is connecting these issues.

We are working to create quality resources to equip Christians with the knowledge they need to promote individual liberty among their families, friends, ministries, and churches.

**We aim to persuade Christians that the political expression of our faith inclines us toward the principles of individual liberty and free markets.**

Can you join LCI in fighting for the Christian case for free people and free markets? **Click below to show your support today.**

Thank you,

Doug Stuart

_We equip followers of Jesus Christ to make the Christian case for a free society._

**P.S Peter, LCI can 't do this alone. **

We need Christians to band together now and show the world what true faith and religion look like, not this woke mockery.

body:

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**

Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjij2rcj6454ufae7belieq9r7u6pd0or5a8lekg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4c1h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj16lvm0851imqjl4k5i12410io7vbu9j9dcsfsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv4rfnpourqo3c50jlkv720rg3rigaoi9gi0rvjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4c1h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrppqcf95p10vtrvnns9f2190fa7djhear0fot38_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4c1h2bs)

For America,

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: SmartAsset
subject: 7 Mistakes People Make When Hiring a Financial Advisor
body:
A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 2
**Choosing a financial advisor is a major decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come.**

A 2020 [Northwestern Mutual study](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvekp4uacsikmsgu46m619couv7nn0eom71a3c8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh2bs) found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.

The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.

A recent [Vanguard study](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq5sgttsti73srl13cvfn0cp4ei8465q35c02ue0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh2bs) found that, on average, a $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.

SmartAsset’s no-cost tool simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three local fiduciary financial advisors, each legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an expert for a free retirement consultation.

Being aware of these seven common blunders when [choosing an advisor](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8f6v2feiaalqjpo8dc34u518idd0sc390aif30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh2bs) can help you find peace of mind, and avoid years of stress.

**1\. Hiring an Advisor Who Is Not a Fiduciary**
By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person’s best interest. This obligation eliminates conflict of interest concerns and makes an advisor’s advice more trustworthy.

All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset’s matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, [use this no-cost tool](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z99osejrmsa0llks7l390kqju2jgbnmpa7jc6loo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh2bs) to find an advisor who has your best interest in mind.

**2\. Hiring the First Advisor You Meet**
While it’s tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you.

**3\. Choosing an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty**
Some financial advisors specialize in retirement planning, others are better for business owners or those with a high net worth, and some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor’s strengths and weaknesses – before signing on the dotted line.

**4\. Picking an Advisor With an Incompatible Strategy**
Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style.

**5\. Not Asking About Credentials**
To give investment advice, financial advisors are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests and credentials. Some advisors are Certified Financial Planners.

**6\. Not Understanding How They are Paid**
Some advisors are “fee only” and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them.

**7\. Trying to Hire an Advisor on Your Own**
Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one.

SmartAsset’s no-cost tool makes it easy to [find a qualified financial advisor](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsbpq4cmeq0j8f4c2jlafq5sraefkjfrek54of30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh2bs). Just answer a few questions about your financial situation and then you can compare up to three advisors local to you, and decide which to work with. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes, and there is absolutely no obligation to work with any of your matches.

[Find your financial advisor match today](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z00jltigqkp7r3dq1jvmgfaq7j5ej2uhmi9385eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh2bs).

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zgtg2osqkcjere16kd57ga351p2gqbblfht4eoi0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zguok4euqqlicd4komibdnfkjlj5kdrgimka2iv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor4cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd0a0u1tc21cn34voqrgrivt6d1qagf6bmmabib0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9pp25ng9bn0o2lbe80828i3ovkd6rk3cvdjg8rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor2cth2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9h1rba8422etccdhngcu8ev01olbdprgrtqvf60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor2cth2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7oof84p5s6tohr117647695s3c9cdvqd9q5emq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmcor2cth2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
