name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0265%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9rYEut8wOfyWlCD9hLkF9g&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42392%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fOkEyi6V0Q9nTXOZTzy2Pw&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42393%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5FcsNur21X8n2JQxQZ6txg&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42394%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g9AL3xepjNABrWOHPK33CA&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42305%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9W8SkI%2fdrtJg8Tm%2fK%2fDEvw&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42306%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ITT1Rlc00A3GD6MVdqBGrg&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42307%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XN5ZPFNpQVxnWBApFHYdaQ&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42308%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bdiA%2fziPpxjfE84CLS4Dhg&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42309%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mlKomX6cXrscV47gLgCHqw&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42300%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qTi5EdldRjf7xgXAzaFelg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42301%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oOOQiMCBXv9%2bDE0ePBFCSg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42302%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vh1cmyPRmdKe7x4RlUgbug&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42303%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F1dyRKewSd3XcPIfmGzTdA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42304%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8GJXIIgPljTPV3RkSHO%2fhg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42315%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lJqDQWESgTkvo%2bY%2f2fGE7A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42316%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aTuVz9zlO8zttBHc6%2buRXg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42317%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LCkSa8RHwOKVRaxihjw6cg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42318%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dWawkxShnYJg8ArR4%2fixfA&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42319%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RUwVIdTsNpEl7GxNourQ6Q&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0265%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9rYEut8wOfyWlCD9hLkF9g&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0265%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9rYEut8wOfyWlCD9hLkF9g&sysid=1)

name: Your America
subject: And What Does It Mean for Your Money?
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CkQK9j2vrhSeEVanuBcvqA&sysid=1) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And [what she’s discovered is startling. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96182%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V3cuNfw4RXg0ol1lJzF7fg&sysid=1) It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96183%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XTHVGLpqo%2b7xBcuvL3cNQg&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96184%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u54S2BxWz6krnK3%2bIcgGRQ&sysid=1)
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7589%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=dRSLp2qZJSkSVvHN43fDHQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7589%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=dRSLp2qZJSkSVvHN43fDHQ&sysid=1)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbv1sfro54aiaj6pu5homvbpoldgdsng1bppi80g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm9o34cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zijur8u0piqsa22mnj6hgalrvkgsiomos6bhr4po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm9o34cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zipbomqvvu11ej6jntq85c3h9r86culvodvslcig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm9o34cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Will D.C. jail kill this Jan.6 peaceful protester?
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it gre
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpgi7549o6eajbaand854995hfnlkojsecb7goj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm9o34cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8cqtg7ri66f4teo6utgg31jf3sj577apo9k8djo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm9o34cph2bs) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb64a7ut6bmhghai72evve0aeqdq5k9ls3eqkag8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthm9o34cph2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Why Government is the Problem
body:
The major social problems of the United States—deteriorating education, lawlessness and crime
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvsc8unklv9bedpdn16euq7ofu2ap0caltk6gmo0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdl6drm1cpj6krr1oj36tgj0p9mmooe6tthepr74d9kmdqb9cpm69rj2otme9o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32tpjckrr4tr66jgb6p9nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeo37cdjm4oj7c8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu7eee9bbkb3s2dkknenmqbqfo17bcr8oilopd6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmeoj2cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, The major social problems of the United States--deteriorating education, lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of family values, the crisis in medical care--all have one thing in common. They have all been produced by the well-intended actions of the government.

And yet, for some reason, more and more Americans look to government as the solution to their problems.
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5k2kgmbe7161oirupuickdo0c7qt72nt0ju64b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmeoj2cth2bs)
---
| | That's why I want you to have **[a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's _Why Government Is the Problem._](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuu6glnn8p7l8q67vvo47asta01mhv0f3pumaulg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmeoj2cth2bs)**

In this eBook, Friedman uses his humble and direct style to:
* **Analyze the continuing social and economic problems as government intervention increases in the U.S.**
* **Shed light on the government and its tilt toward special interests over citizen interests. **
* **Demonstrate how and why government is the problem.**

Friend, I really think you'll get a lot out of this eBook. It's a favorite among supporters of Hoover. And although some of the particulars have changed since he wrote this in 1993, I think you'll find the situation is frighteningly similar today.

**[Please use this link to get access to your copy of _Why Government Is the Problem_ now.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z32h1larp92lu3rm06r2et8bo92u2fht9q1vit2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cthmeoj2cth2bs)** Thank you,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5dl8ordo9g4uj30obklf8rvnv2c0r3poke9effo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrs6en0hnelj2u8r081881lp091sqv25ciqjua78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z21ldd5c208ahijg08982mapi5g3feg0iqrar198_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq81mtsqrm8knrgra1kromfoe2eghv7lmlunsto8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm0o72c5h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvhn5f6o0u7ghhg08j0pfh2bqere2hp7n1iqdqeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm0o72c5h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfultp6d1olt451d5bdr5tber0dpqpdcrsc2cneo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm0o72c5h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr88mkgsja1i6pknqurrbkiss47j261vtkna8hrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm0o72c5h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt7hdpd3a8akjf54b3iic0nmhkvdg96pon25gofg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm0o72c5h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8lhv2008ak1g5iqd2iaqo64pccir81n6lsf260_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm0o72c5h2bs)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e3d0c26700f24ecfab75c87c1f96ff38&_e=bU25DbnEzJTW8eTz9daK7tnU3BcEvVcGlbAB6sP1vua4lzXwf767omlxWhJFWsarfnQ6ZSfdcgEPD3T3VAN2SkA68weQzN1NQmRp8fTGycaZPdq9EBzxOkxIIP4RK0rAzA_JxRwxk-85qVkccn9x1waNK_xSKP_SejwlCzeqEUwB00YtBlZb3OZYj7a76yvRhSIrhDmYZ1tKGTZV-j2uQsD8dz17DD6mmwruI2MwcdSXL3ltNU5u7X8U1yQHW9GdTD-hpJjVTiDYI-kbeInB9RTed3Azpdj_YrPhBDHDWlDaoJijzwslTVZEPWnEd00O_hW9XP7rzx_caazqT5y4hTA3xotRGYvc9LzCSh2jcrPwbfUEKdV2CFWHLyUS6yEWUNw2wVB8ut7v0EMunFX23A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e3d0c26700f24ecfab75c87c1f96ff38&_e=bU25DbnEzJTW8eTz9daK7tnU3BcEvVcGlbAB6sP1vua4lzXwf767omlxWhJFWsarfnQ6ZSfdcgEPD3T3VAN2SkA68weQzN1NQmRp8fTGycaZPdq9EBzxOkxIIP4RK0rAzA_JxRwxk-85qVkccn9x1waNK_xSKP_SejwlCzeqEUwB00YtBlZb3OZYj7a76yvRhSIrhDmYZ1tKGTZV-j2uQsD8dz17DD6mmwruI2MwcdSXL3ltNU5u7X8U1yQHW9GdmgqGpp3XxjmvP2MadhhyA3PDpVoboqyOrw4X91Se20hQnz-AtoliQmvtRihCzsTitg57ZoBmz_7CEHWmieHc4JwMmJgKE8pUXvtzZtCP2n6pF1McZQOkVKKSis6OxVCkLeNN9cELLul4088J9w54bA%3D%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e3d0c26700f24ecfab75c87c1f96ff38&_e=bU25DbnEzJTW8eTz9daK7tnU3BcEvVcGlbAB6sP1vua4lzXwf767omlxWhJFWsarfnQ6ZSfdcgEPD3T3VAN2SkA68weQzN1NQmRp8fTGycaZPdq9EBzxOkxIIP4RK0rAzA_JxRwxk-85qVkccn9x1waNK_xSKP_SejwlCzeqEUwB00YtBlZb3OZYj7a76yvRhSIrhDmYZ1tKGTZV-j2uQsD8dz17DD6mmwruI2MwcdSXL3ltNU5u7X8U1yQHW9GdobwsvYc1p7hys8P7P_7kuTe3AH6aO8TTjH2c8cbb77NUSq9GXMOR1EXr9mTp-wVyS9kG6t9wX_9w36K3gOl7gDYu4wfUcfvxvEo8pABmOicqU6PWnAhOl5VtqAUXqnkKLFt7zz2qtPyapCMt_i9vEg%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

subject: I come bearing grave news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:

_**Without faith, our nation would have never succeeded.**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053194:6spryVGNN:m:1:3331421248:C3E6BD366E7CCD3797FDB6F3F75CA5E7:r)
---

I come bearing grave news: the believers whose values shaped our great nation are now under attack. People of faith across the country have been ridiculed and shunned by Democrats and Hollywood elites for defending the teachings of the Bible.

These attacks on freedom of religion must STOP in America. That's why I started Advancing American Freedom to stand up for the religious freedoms of every American of faith. _**[Please, join me today in making sure every American has the right to worship without fear of persecution.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053194:6spryVGNN:m:1:3331421248:C3E6BD366E7CCD3797FDB6F3F75CA5E7:r "Please, join me today in making sure every American has the right to worship without fear of persecution.")**_

---
| | [STAND UP FOR RELIGIOUS FREEDOM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053194:6spryVGNN:m:1:3331421248:C3E6BD366E7CCD3797FDB6F3F75CA5E7:r)
---

Under the Trump-Pence administration, we defended religious freedom at home and abroad. We didn't let freedom of speech end at the front doors of our churches, synagogues, or houses of worship. We protected the faith of all Americans.

Advancing American Freedom will continue to defend our right to worship. Make a contribution today to stand with AAF and protect the faiths of all Americans. Your donation will go a long way in defending faith based policies that protect religious freedom in America.

Without the support of patriots like you, I am worried our religious freedoms will continue to be suppressed.

God Bless,
Mike Pence

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztnc5cgfu2k9dmolp8uif145et6h9nqpi3hkhlb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo74u5tv17o41aib72s0bhj77ijgdlat952m9h48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za1897mtdtvprhitc6p96h1g6fqics6oofgth4vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg6cm9s6g65rj670d4o2k7m5kcpime1mjl3sskeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsuhr0va4muuv8er9ei6o9n8eu4u1b9512oalofo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zggtb95i1ddqh9q2kpfm4if47fa53cgkkfgsio30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvkgps7vr43eqqig293lutm9f3v8laa6jq8ju03g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z88jdinq39uk1cu6athpu7u8mv0ggr1gm1fc40bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze47v7a3i7ln9ioved0ok96lf4je8macvgja23h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z293f4fatrrom5jegoclfhqapodh65vokcghfhc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze80b3t075l23qq37r6lclghmpvbl35tfcrtf8jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ah2urnu9uk2ec51pi8buuhq16f55kt1f4ov6tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc0hvqi0nqmp8qiq1k3lq8f3ja3km8td8h6rc280_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpngubjq0o4g9grv7rnhc8ghql5mbsgtkhah48po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ht6cff73jaqr01fj1kmimpujvconc317kla7c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajoa4pdhrl14gllpaj5ioii4bnlo4fv5do9h9g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zir68m901qjbof000gvrbfbd8olbuin6s8ktgt9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbqodvuiqhm3d48ra9hfoomksf11pf917eaq5jpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm4or4c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z89t0er9jvc2ntarfki9gnnhimoh79cffk524040).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zog7ujmtjll88pj66i2q628pm7egjr1dnp1583s0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1jmeoj3chge49fg)

name: American Action News
subject: Herschel Walker Lost His Election – But Did Republicans Lose The Senate?
body:
And Herschel Walker Lost His Election – But Did Republicans Lose The Senate?

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs6cevsedd6tts3vk15po0472k0d5g3rgd2ig738_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjmcpb4cdh2bs)
---
_We report, you act._

subject: The FBI did WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LANDRY FOR LOUISIANA**
body:
---
| | | | | | | Peter, Big Tech has to be investigated.

This is Attorney General Jeff Landry, and I want to tell you why I'm running for Governor.

According to a source in the FBI, social media was warned by the FBI to look out for "Russian propaganda", ahead of the 2020 election.
_**The FBI even held weekly meetings with Big Tech companies to discuss how to censor "Russian disinformation!"**_
---
| | | [HOLD BIG TECH ACCOUNTABLE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053184:68R-yVGNF:m:1:3331703221:18B91B12EA9A58C65D06797E832FBC73:r "HOLD BIG TECH ACCOUNTABLE")
---
This is blatant sabotage on our elections and freedoms, Peter. Big Tech cannot be allowed to get away with facilitating this. The American public deserves better.

At the very least, the public deserves safety and protection, which is the **PRIMARY ROLE** of government!
**_[It is time to put an end to this corruption and take a stand for freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053184:68R-yVGNF:m:1:3331703221:18B91B12EA9A58C65D06797E832FBC73:r "It is time to put
an end to this corruption and take a stand for freedom. ")_**
Peter, will you join me?

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5q7v26a6b3so5lflren6f8h8k7agccj4qh07o5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm2ob4clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9fk7r80a6v0e4qnia2j68pkcarenteq1cf39cg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm2ob4clh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkq5lagj5vbbmovcq2lld7uk09ilsvb6bvhb4p9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm2ob4clh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z77j917v587od625surkdhcjuc51bcnj1ljoq0q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm2ob4clh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg958d55fi3j0vovlqq3ou8nhp9t3autf5i3tm3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm2ob4clh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6mh9aops6dhs14q43rso911vcmhosnjb9bv81bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm1o36cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpvbkv98i41l1fhf32o8gb3at61fbc2kmf1419fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm1o36cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zup6p27888rad6rjt7igpqub6seb404vkd5o7vj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm1o36cdh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuk9g6nmkqq303oj8onc9jeebmu2984mp47v4mgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctjm1o36cdh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7595%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=SYZWiTBShcbiUh3kvCm88w&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96123%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sakeMk44lUILGHi%2bOoEf%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96124%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QoOkhfM9GLNjwnYHwTsdMA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96135%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zzoRI17rS4aW%2bb9x7qL5Uw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96136%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cUiqM83cji1ZlRZIsWUDvg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7595%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=SYZWiTBShcbiUh3kvCm88w&sysid=1)_

name: The Truth
subject: Why is the Biden family scared of the truth?
body:
Help us expose the truth about Hunter's involvement with the Obama State Department!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053203:J9A9yVGzN:m:1:3331421248:1ADFDC4182D651751018D223311F2E90:r "USJF") Peter: I want to send you a quick update on our FOIA lawsuit for State Department's documents pertaining to Hunter Biden. We had our first court hearing the other day and the Biden officials continue to fight against the release of documents related to Hunter Biden that we requested over two years ago! The court case is heating up and while the judge made some favorable rulings, we still don't have the documents and will need to ramp up our efforts to win this case! We're battling the Biden-controlled federal government which has an unlimited budget and will do everything in its power to delay the court case, especially when they know they'll ultimately lose. In short, the Biden Administration is hoping to bleed us dry in the process before we can expose the truth about Hunter's involvement with the State Department! **[You can help us continue the fight... but it means we need your donation today so we can see this fight to the end and finally force the Biden Administration to release the documents exposing Hunter's actions!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053203:J9A9yVGzN:m:1:3331421248:1ADFDC4182D651751018D223311F2E90:r "You can help us continue the fight... but it means we need
your $25, $50, or $100 donation today so we can see this fight to the end and finally force the Biden Administration to release the documents exposing
Hunter’s actions!")** It's no secret that they're scared of what we might uncover. Just look at what's already been exposed in their dealings with Twitter over the Hunter Laptop story. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053203:J9A9yVGzN:m:1:3331421248:1ADFDC4182D651751018D223311F2E90:r "Headline")**Elon Musk showed exactly what we suspected all along - the Biden team worked overtime to make sure no one knew about Hunter's Laptop before the 2020 election!** They even got the FBI to claim that it was "Russian disinformation." Makes you wonder what the Big Guy is so worried about! That's why we can't let up now! America deserves to know how the Obama State Department helped enrich the Biden family. **[You deserve the truth! Will you chip in TODAY and help us win this case so America can know the truth?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053203:J9A9yVGzN:m:1:3331421248:1ADFDC4182D651751018D223311F2E90:r "You deserve the truth! Will
you chip in $50, $100, or $500 TODAY and help us win this case so America can know the truth?")** The potential smoking gun against Hunter is within reach. That's why the State Department is trying to run out the clock on us! That's why I'm reaching out to you. We've got them on the ropes, but we need to keep punching up against the behemoth forces at the U.S. Justice Department. But we're only going to know the truth if we win this case. **[Will you step up and help us force the State Department to release the documents? Please donate today and help us make history!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053203:J9A9yVGzN:m:1:3331421248:1ADFDC4182D651751018D223311F2E90:r "Will you step up and help us force the State Department to
release the documents? Please donate today and help us make history!")** Thank you,
James V. Lacy
President, U.S. Justice Foundation
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0268%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4bDWLsYMVV%2fttcmak0OJ9A&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42329%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o0kPVJ5J8jIaPX35Ldj6XA&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42320%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u7b2FbLzCQX6yvbMeJcHAg&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42321%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aUtLAAJAP8O1eFUkGkIG1A&sysid=1)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42322%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ELFn1XxcIPA4CQVRmwFjHA&sysid=1) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I've got some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter,

I have some _bad news and worse news_.

The bad news is that a federal appeals court ruled against President Trump.

The Biden regime's criminal investigation witch hunt can proceed.

**_And now the worse news._**

Unless I can raise the resources necessary to help defend President Trump, the longest witch hunt in history will expand.

_And you could be the next target_.

The Biden regime will continue terrorizing, spying on, and jailing Trump supporters in the federal gulag.

**And I need your help to show President Trump that the America First movement has his back.**

**[That's why it's critical you chip in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) [**DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) **The FBI siege at Mar-a-Lago was just the first step.**

Then Joe Biden declared war on red states, comparing the MAGA movement to domestic terrorists.

And now, a federal court handed Joe Biden a permission slip to try and throw Donald Trump in jail.

America First Patriots need to fight back right away.

**But that can only happen if I raise the funds to defend President Trump.**

I need your help to send a message that no one in the D.C. swamp can ignore.

**[Please help me defend President Trump by chipping in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r).** [**DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP
CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) [** DEFEND TRUMP - CONTRIBUTE $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) [** DEFEND TRUMP - CONTRIBUTE $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) [** DEFEND TRUMP - CONTRIBUTE $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) [** DEFEND TRUMP - CONTRIBUTE $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) [** DEFEND TRUMP - CONTRIBUTE NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61255039:WpZAkYDN4:m:1:2365227053:336E6C85E5F9BEDE7156DD2A98CCD230:r) _Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75fb76d513534c0f9279dcac8233a91e&_e=fIF2qiCGaVs0oP0wptMIl3w948bdNeHuSdNeKIeSD3eS23GDXtPL2GVDFHekL5KM3s_h2tJsfU6dMLH07ZKqti0ki4K3X1QfkNYIsAx0B69iIMGg_7MoeF7ZeqWxI9vs6tZYZdvkKa7yIO3gluT4S0isn0ULCaz1hF-BGD7tpl9ZTFWTEuofea8WXuvruppoeGRWzxNOo5lJsEwV1yEduB0ikUHmgjpg2ZEEiPkgE46gR8Tu5b6_yb4h1X-j3GFxXf_IJaySokRr_exbPbNZEAmjIp6_uOcgWpPMS2ry77g%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75fb76d513534c0f9279dcac8233a91e&_e=fIF2qiCGaVs0oP0wptMIl3w948bdNeHuSdNeKIeSD3eS23GDXtPL2GVDFHekL5KM3s_h2tJsfU6dMLH07ZKqti0ki4K3X1QfkNYIsAx0B69iIMGg_7MoeF7ZeqWxI9vs6tZYZdvkKa7yIO3gluT4Sz_jksxohGjHoFcZ9FGkYUe3OVCzBtsxpSJeFPuYhIgsaq83gVt-HK_ea6bCv6GEQf35C0VBuZ_Mf7_AL9sTrbIC5-iomgXPDrV6paF3Na4J3O9S2pDh07mwKpiKzYnQLw9b2J4WIRTDU48ROze8_Rg%3D)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75fb76d513534c0f9279dcac8233a91e&_e=fIF2qiCGaVs0oP0wptMIl3w948bdNeHuSdNeKIeSD3eS23GDXtPL2GVDFHekL5KM3s_h2tJsfU6dMLH07ZKqti0ki4K3X1QfkNYIsAx0B69iIMGg_7MoeF7ZeqWxI9vs6tZYZdvkKa7yIO3gluT4S4J7Swv4gotiBx5O60b7vuBQfjPV81TtUNgbmzHdClirzJLKYR4o5J7sX2_KICh8tIqXWDgBHEm3JanWYSmTdxKae9OozndDKp58qAB0WohkWX9LbaTxEvg0PVpBJI00qA_YtidDGP7Z2UzuF2e8BEw%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75fb76d513534c0f9279dcac8233a91e&_e=fIF2qiCGaVs0oP0wptMIl3w948bdNeHuSdNeKIeSD3eS23GDXtPL2GVDFHekL5KM3s_h2tJsfU6dMLH07ZKqti0ki4K3X1QfkNYIsAx0B69iIMGg_7MoeF7ZeqWxI9vs6tZYZdvkKa7yIO3gluT4S8Ryu6X6j6prsMwOYFxAQiOlAYEGPuzaUafxG-RGK7VGSPjMBhEoluAeuHyfXkaAKBNSKsleFswDZOW_BZmakUXW9gj505B5MRsn5syPEjNqmg_5wsJ7J3zapVi34wZQtdrWp24Cfnf9Y0-B0baPC44%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.
