clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj2dr9mbnhitnt4h908v7i5sqa8jk0ol5rc25jeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctgecob4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6amtmdav5jne8k4r71bagkjvhshhf32c25kfg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctgecob4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjllecbdaklf2piskdlh8rrvmqi0uamv1mdve238_rp22sh2s8i66pr0ctgecob4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
#

Peter -
I can trace my drive to achieve success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about what’s next — do I challenge Senator Sinema or not? — what I learned growing up and during my time in the Marines is that I can’t do it alone.
I’ll need your help if we’re going to be ready on day one. Because if we’re not, we’ll get swallowed up fast. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today? It adds up when we’re all chipping in. And truthfully, that’s the only way we have a chance to win: together.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221211-1-v2&t=1&akid=208%2E734936%2EpJiEfr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=gallego-em-dec.OQ83jX&refcode=em221211-1-v2&t=23&akid=208%2E734936%2EpJiEfr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=gallego-em-dec.8fyKt1&refcode=em221211-1-v2&t=24&akid=208%2E734936%2EpJiEfr)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=gallego-em-dec.r7FY6v&refcode=em221211-1-v2&t=25&akid=208%2E734936%2EpJiEfr)**
---
****
The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in would be amazed to see me today.
And I think the Marine who came home from Iraq would be proud, as well.
Thank you,
Ruben
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221211-1-v2&t=26&akid=208%2E734936%2EpJiEfr)

name: Nick, Democrats.org
subject: Looking ahead:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
With November and the Georgia runoff behind us, a lot of you might be wondering why small dollar donations are still so urgent. | |
---
Derek -- as our end of year deadline nears, we’ve been keeping a close eye on our progress to our fundraising goal. We’re just a few days into this month, but _something caught our eye_ : **At this point last month, we had 3,208 donations from Pennsylvania. So far this month, we are only at 1,099.** Growing our infrastructure and continuing to make powerful investments in races up and down the ticket is only possible with grassroots support -- and with elections coming up in 2023 and 2024, we need this team to help fund the resources Democratic candidates will need to run and _win_. **Can you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help our team catch up and continue powering our work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot?**

clean_body: With November and the Georgia runoff behind us, a lot of you might be wondering why small dollar donations are still so urgent. | | Derek -- as our end of year deadline nears, we’ve been keeping a close eye on our progress to our fundraising goal. We’re just a few days into this month, but something caught our eye : At this point last month, we had 3,208 donations from Pennsylvania. So far this month, we are only at 1,099. Growing our infrastructure and continuing to make powerful investments in races up and down the ticket is only possible with grassroots support -- and with elections coming up in 2023 and 2024, we need this team to help fund the resources Democratic candidates will need to run and win. Can you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help our team catch up and continue powering our work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot? Our party is stronger than ever because of the support of grassroots donors. But we cannot let all of that hard work go to waste just because November and the Georgia runoff are behind us. There are no off years at the DNC. We must keep investing in our party infrastructure ahead of upcoming elections, and that’s not possible without your support. If you can continue supporting our party, especially now, while there’s plenty of time to allocate resources in a smart and meaningful way, you’ll set Democrats up and down the ballot for success. Thank you, Nick Nick Andricola Email and SMS Director Democratic National Committee | Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Giffords
subject: Add your name to join us in standing against hate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must call on Congress to pass the Disarm Hate Act and prevent hate-filled individuals from accessing firearms.
#

Friends -
Over 10,000 people each year are victims of hate crimes involving firearms. But people convicted of violent hate crime misdemeanors are still eligible to purchase firearms in 28 states.
This is unacceptable, and we have solutions to change this devastating reality. Legislation such as the Disarm Hate Act would ensure individuals convicted of a misdemeanor hate crime are prohibited from receiving or possessing a firearm.
But we need Congress to have the courage to act.
[**Sign our petition today to join us in calling on our legislators to pass the Disarm Hate Act to prevent hate-filled individuals from accessing firearms.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_disarmhate_dec22/?source=em221211-1-15&refcode2=2837.3935704.XRj5ln&akid=2837%2E3935704%2EXRj5ln)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_disarmhate_dec22/?source=em221211-1-15&refcode2=2837.3935704.XRj5ln&akid=2837%2E3935704%2EXRj5ln)**
We must do more to protect our communities, especially our most vulnerable populations. With an increase in hateful rhetoric and our country’s weak gun laws, it is far too easy for someone motivated by bigotry to access firearms.
We saw the LGBTQ+ community targeted at Pulse Nightclub in 2016, and just weeks ago at Club Q. Black people targeted at Tops Supermarket in Buffalo and Emanuel AME Church in Charleston. Latinos at an El Paso Walmart. Jews in Pittsburgh. Sikhs in Oak Creek.
This has to change. Nobody should feel afraid based on who they are, the color of their skin, where they come from, who they love, or their faith.
[**So please, add your name to join us in calling on Congress to pass the Disarm Hate Act to ensure people motivated by hatred and bigotry cannot access guns.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_disarmhate_dec22/?source=em221211-1-15&refcode2=2837.3935704.XRj5ln&akid=2837%2E3935704%2EXRj5ln)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_disarmhate_dec22/?source=em221211-1-15&refcode2=2837.3935704.XRj5ln&akid=2837%2E3935704%2EXRj5ln)**
Thank you for taking action,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=2837%2E3935704%2EXRj5ln) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Friend,

_Have you heard the EPIC news?_

For all RINOs, Never Trumpers, Radical Left Democrats, and, of course, the Fake News Media, please enjoy this latest poll from highly respected Emerson College. I'm sure you will be thrilled.

_**According to the results, I am leading by an incredible 30 points against several RINOs.**_

I'm not surprised. Under my leadership, our Nation was at a pinnacle of power, prosperity, and prestige--towering above all rivals, vanquishing all enemies, and striding into the future confident and strong.

I will keep working for YOU. As the 2024 Election rapidly approaches, I URGENTLY need a brave Patriot like _**YOU**_ on my side.

_**Remember, this will not be MY campaign --this will be OUR campaign. Because the only force strong enough to defeat the massive corruption we are up against is YOU, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.**_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: No one else does what we do.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Money has always been our #1 obstacle. And the establishment has a
seemingly endless supply of it. Since this is a grassroots funded
organization, we don’t have billionaire donors or corporate PACs to fall
back on when our fundraising slows down.

No other organization in the progressive arena does what we do. We don’t
simply endorse candidates, write them a check, and say goodbye. When we
recruit a candidate to run for Congress, we embed ourselves into their
campaigns and provide unparalleled strategy and support.

We’re not only supporting transformational candidates as they run for
Congress, but also building the long term infrastructure that allows
progressive, anti-establishment candidates to run, compete, win and begin
the work of building a better future for all of us.

Unfortunately, over the last year, we’ve seen an unprecedented slowdown in
our fundraising and we’re now in a tough position as we budget for 2023.

If we don’t turn this around before the end of the year, we’re going to
have to start looking at where to make budget cuts.

We need your support today. We’re not telling you this to try and scare
you into donating, but rather to be transparent about how our decline in
fundraising is impacting us as an organization.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123081?refcode=em20221211-26500&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26500%2E1203867%2EHs6e4u ]Peter, every
donation we receive truly makes an impact and will help us plan for the
long term. Will you donate $3 or any amount you can spare
today to help us continue to transform the Democratic Party until it truly
represents the people?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123081?refcode=em20221211-26500&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26500%2E1203867%2EHs6e4u ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=26500%2E1203867%2EHs6e4u ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=26500%2E1203867%2EHs6e4u ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221211-26500-footer&t=1023&refcode2=26500_1203867_Hs6e4u&akid=26500%2E1203867%2EHs6e4u

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=26500%2E1203867%2EHs6e4u

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Seeing Becca in the freshman class photo is SO amazing! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55847345/382990620/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjNiMTExZi05ZTc5LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lrQjWPBgJMAfZN3GFbxowv_lcbAiQ2TUFEVGE_nL9E=&emci=db3849e8-d877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=7f3b111f-9e79-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Seeing Becca on the cover of _The Washington Post_ for the 118th Congress freshman class photo is _surreal_ – and something that was ONLY made possible thanks to the support people like you put behind her this year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55847346/382990621/137396421?refcode=E19766-20221211-MidMonth1-graphic-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjNiMTExZi05ZTc5LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lrQjWPBgJMAfZN3GFbxowv_lcbAiQ2TUFEVGE_nL9E=) When Becca launched her campaign for Congress, she had an email supporter list of about 500 people. But together, we built a community of thousands of supporters who stepped up to chip in $5, $10, and $27 at a time. And together, we bucked the status quo and sent a working mom, teacher, and openly LGBTQ woman to Congress. **Running for Congress is a massive undertaking – one that’s a heck of a lot easier with a strong grassroots team behind you.**[**In order to close out the year strong and keep up with our fundraising goal, we need to raise $5,000 by our mid-month deadline on December 15th. ** ** ** Loudoun Special Grand Jury Report **
---
| |
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=50a70b4acc6345d3a652c5982e868758&_e=_u47X5JwrK7QSV0MfjQ1fn7twVii3xEBBmhUTw8VIllb99TNrfzffmrd5blFylCF8tAcg2B_5BNXC-Y7xUU6CPp8vRnFYm0ibeUhtXN0cEgLs_EBw86VIKx6EuYpze6aUlDpYyfCOwikihkS4Au9YRAPJnSYt41AauCvl6DvXuuxotRdN2OZJFETwAGF078lNs-ZkkHaagDAEvLkaPvqnUd86qP7lXZaLQ7dYmFZTTM%3D)
---
**_The grand jury appointed by Attorney General Miyares released its report after a months-long investigation into how the school system handled sexual assaults. The School Board failed to demand accountability or conduct proper oversight of the superintendent and staff._****_ _****This grand jury report represents a big step in ensuring that the number one priority for Loudoun County Public Schools, as well as all school districts across the Commonwealth, is the safety of our students.**
---
[**READ THE GRAND JURY REPORT HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=50a70b4acc6345d3a652c5982e868758&_e=_u47X5JwrK7QSV0MfjQ1fuV6VejxEdhGtybvBR57sai7Ull8UGko6K0YfAgdYEkFTl0Zd05dX_-ybEMOQdxJcru4_8x9HVbxSw8Fp0-yiJigXEzzQ0eA-bAGARz8Z1CbM5TzE2DXB1bIfmS59V5vhV6I4HFuDGEyJxDsRXEpqx9yrCcoUoVBk1Scz3BaZP_CqdBFfUH3N7sWQB4h4-l7P97CewVityYsKkgh9tClB6c%3D)
---
---
---
**On Thursday, Attorney General Miyares announced that national law firm Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP was selected to conduct the external review of the events that led to the tragic death of three University of Virginia students and the injuries to two others.** ** ** _“I have full confidence that Mr. Burck, Ms. Nix-Hines, and Mr. Terwilliger will conduct the thorough and professional external review requested by the University of Virginia. Understandably, there are many questions about the events that led to the tragedy at University of Virginia. At the appropriate time, a report will be released to the public to help answer those questions.”_ _ _**– Attorney General Miyares**
---
[**LEARN MORE ABOUT THE SPECIAL COUNSELS HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=50a70b4acc6345d3a652c5982e868758&_e=_u47X5JwrK7QSV0MfjQ1fpVlf-tIa025-dxoJxlpngSFz100iR2s7M7IH8s2QhyYo-eqNrFvnDA_2Szkbax18D36HakOEcVrmjF5YOeaaRwsccpORFmhmk69xlZyd4gRnxWepsOsTt4KyFCf_mSOWJBRzJfEetuJaMvftN3Hlp3fh6Ap8FAM0CNFwWTBLfdaIBBpVe4OebZl5ncWnj7SMzdEvJ7CkOk5W--_peVDbhg39ZP5Wq4MLZ0A0Ut2TiPYeMjAr4i1PsrbqEz_060vS1CDW_y4NhT4ebzXsVehnhwxKLkF9BLpv47k8aIdpo9TI9FYRKXt9UJCYoP6QOA5-FLkVbQzO1849iQ0oKvG6qzriAyQUa-KSxG6zJF8-mjFd_PHI1B8IhYb0MewmaknHA8gbSBVAacIqHwfXsnmex0R7nrTythdE5v9jueBXcwr)
---
---

**As a result of a settlement agreement in principle with JUUL Labs, Virginia is one step closer to holding bad actors accountable for their disregard for the health and wellness of the Commonwealth’s youth.**** ****In addition to the expected $16.8 million, the terms of the settlement also require JUUL from engaging in deceptive marketing tactics that appeal to youth.** _**Other prohibited misleading marketing tactics include:**_
* **Funding education programs**
* **Depicting persons under age 35 in any marketing**
* **Using cartoon advertisements**
* **Selling flavors not approved by the FDA**
* **Allowing access to websites without age verification on the landing page**
* **Using paid influencers**
* **Advertising in outlets unless 85% of the audience is adult**

---

**Getting in the Holiday Spirit**
---
---
| |
---
| | **The Attorney General got out to ring some bells for The Salvation Army this week with Delegate Durant!** ** ****The Salvation Army holds a special place in AG Miyares’ heart. When his mother fled communist Cuba, her first meal & set of clothes were provided by the Salvation Army. **
---
**Combatting Antisemitism**
---
---
| |
---
**This week, the Governor’s Commission to Combat Antisemitism convened again and released an official report highlighting antisemitic acts in Virginia and providing 21 recommendations for how the State can better support and protect our Jewish community.**** ****_Since the earliest days of this nation, Virginia has been a pioneer for religious freedom._****_ _** **_As Attorney General of Virginia, Jason Miyares is dedicated to protecting Virginians from any and all forms of hate and antisemitic intolerance._**
---

**This week, AG Miyares joined a bipartisan coalition of States in filing an amicus brief at the United States Supreme Court in Gonzalez v. Google. The brief urges the Court to interpret Section 230 of the federal Communications Decency Act (1996) narrowly to ensure technology companies remain accountable to state consumer protection laws.** ** ** _“Over the past twenty years, information technology has rapidly advanced, making the internet a dramatically different place than it was when Section 230 was originally enacted. In order for our technology laws to be effective and ensure consumers are protected, these laws must modernize as technology does to ensure that social media companies claiming Section 230 immunity are not exploiting users.”_ _ _**– Attorney General Miyares**

**AG Miyares helped lead specialized training sessions aimed at sexual assault investigations and how to help a traumatized victim.**** ** **This program – _Trauma-Informed Sexual Assault Training_ – is hosted by the Office of Attorney General for law enforcement personnel, sex crimes investigators, victim advocates, forensic nurses, and local prosecutors. **** ** **AG Miyares continues advocating for victims’ rights.**

**Celebrating Oliver Hill**
---
---

**Attorney General Miyares was pleased to invite artist Elaine Bankston to join him in the unveiling of Oliver Hill’s portrait in the Richmond office’s newly-dedicated Oliver Hill Room. Elaine Bankston commissioned this portrait. Oliver Hill was an African American attorney and civil rights activist born in Richmond. Hill was one of the leading lawyers in a lawsuit that eventually was consolidated with others into the landmark U.S. Supreme Court case,_Brown v. Board of Education_. **
---
**Attorney General Miyares Issues Restitution Checks to Consumers Harmed by Virginia Service Dogs Organization**
---
---
**This week, AG Miyares announced restitution checks totaling almost $200,000 were paid to consumers deceived by Madison County’s Service Dogs by Warren Retrievers Inc.**** ** _“Service Dogs by Warren Retrievers, Inc. sold dogs that purportedly could assist people with various conditions such as diabetes, autism, seizure disorders, or post-traumatic stress. I’m proud that we are now able to return some money to these consumers, thanks to the dedication and commitment of my Consumer Protection Section.”_ ** ****– Attorney General Miyares**** ** **Instead of receiving service dogs, consumers often were delivered poorly-trained puppies with significant behavioral challenges and inadequate skills or training. The organization also misled customers, charitable donors, and the public about certain aspects of the business’s payment structure, its affiliation with local police departments, and the owner’s own military service.**
---
---
---
**Last year, Virginians voted for change.**** ** **As his first year as AG nears, we are very proud of the positive developments made in public safety and accountability standards throughout Virginia.**

clean_body: | | | Loudoun Special Grand Jury Report | | The grand jury appointed by Attorney General Miyares released its report after a months-long investigation into how the school system handled sexual assaults. The School Board failed to demand accountability or conduct proper oversight of the superintendent and staff. This grand jury report represents a big step in ensuring that the number one priority for Loudoun County Public Schools, as well as all school districts across the Commonwealth, is the safety of our students. On Thursday, Attorney General Miyares announced that national law firm Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP was selected to conduct the external review of the events that led to the tragic death of three University of Virginia students and the injuries to two others. “I have full confidence that Mr. Burck, Ms. Nix-Hines, and Mr. Terwilliger will conduct the thorough and professional external review requested by the University of Virginia. Understandably, there are many questions about the events that led to the tragedy at University of Virginia. At the appropriate time, a report will be released to the public to help answer those questions.” – Attorney General Miyares As a result of a settlement agreement in principle with JUUL Labs, Virginia is one step closer to holding bad actors accountable for their disregard for the health and wellness of the Commonwealth’s youth. In addition to the expected $16.8 million, the terms of the settlement also require JUUL from engaging in deceptive marketing tactics that appeal to youth. Other prohibited misleading marketing tactics include: Funding education programs Depicting persons under age 35 in any marketing Using cartoon advertisements Selling flavors not approved by the FDA Allowing access to websites without age verification on the landing page Using paid influencers Advertising in outlets unless 85% of the audience is adult Getting in the Holiday Spirit | | | | The Attorney General got out to ring some bells for The Salvation Army this week with Delegate Durant! **The Salvation Army holds a special place in AG Miyares’ heart. When his mother fled communist Cuba, her first meal & set of clothes were provided by the Salvation Army. Combatting Antisemitism | | This week, the Governor’s Commission to Combat Antisemitism convened again and released an official report highlighting antisemitic acts in Virginia and providing 21 recommendations for how the State can better support and protect our Jewish community. Since the earliest days of this nation, Virginia has been a pioneer for religious freedom. As Attorney General of Virginia, Jason Miyares is dedicated to protecting Virginians from any and all forms of hate and antisemitic intolerance. | | | | | This week, AG Miyares joined a bipartisan coalition of States in filing an amicus brief at the United States Supreme Court in Gonzalez v. Google. The brief urges the Court to interpret Section 230 of the federal Communications Decency Act (1996) narrowly to ensure technology companies remain accountable to state consumer protection laws. “Over the past twenty years, information technology has rapidly advanced, making the internet a dramatically different place than it was when Section 230 was originally enacted. In order for our technology laws to be effective and ensure consumers are protected, these laws must modernize as technology does to ensure that social media companies claiming Section 230 immunity are not exploiting users.” – Attorney General Miyares | | AG Miyares helped lead specialized training sessions aimed at sexual assault investigations and how to help a traumatized victim. This program – Trauma-Informed Sexual Assault Training – is hosted by the Office of Attorney General for law enforcement personnel, sex crimes investigators, victim advocates, forensic nurses, and local prosecutors. AG Miyares continues advocating for victims’ rights. Celebrating Oliver Hill | | Attorney General Miyares was pleased to invite artist Elaine Bankston to join him in the unveiling of Oliver Hill’s portrait in the Richmond office’s newly-dedicated Oliver Hill Room. Elaine Bankston commissioned this portrait. Oliver Hill was an African American attorney and civil rights activist born in Richmond. Hill was one of the leading lawyers in a lawsuit that eventually was consolidated with others into the landmark U.S. Supreme Court case,Brown v. Board of Education. Attorney General Miyares Issues Restitution Checks to Consumers Harmed by Virginia Service Dogs Organization This week, AG Miyares announced restitution checks totaling almost $200,000 were paid to consumers deceived by Madison County’s Service Dogs by Warren Retrievers Inc. “Service Dogs by Warren Retrievers, Inc. sold dogs that purportedly could assist people with various conditions such as diabetes, autism, seizure disorders, or post-traumatic stress. I’m proud that we are now able to return some money to these consumers, thanks to the dedication and commitment of my Consumer Protection Section.” – Attorney General Miyares Instead of receiving service dogs, consumers often were delivered poorly-trained puppies with significant behavioral challenges and inadequate skills or training. The organization also misled customers, charitable donors, and the public about certain aspects of the business’s payment structure, its affiliation with local police departments, and the owner’s own military service. Last year, Virginians voted for change. As his first year as AG nears, we are very proud of the positive developments made in public safety and accountability standards throughout Virginia. Happy Birthday, Governor! Throughout it all, YOU have been a crucial part of this journey. So today, let’s look at your contributions this year: | Peter's personalized Year in Review: In 2022, you opened emails from my campaign... You signed petitions... But you donated $0 this year! = | = Peter, sadly, we lost the House majority. That means we'll need to work on overdrive to keep Republican extremism at bay and protect vulnerable Americans. I’m so grateful for all your support in 2022. But in 2023, we’ll have to fight even harder. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you again, Peter. Many people did not believe that we were going to show up to Buffalo, NY in December but we did. We are showing, just like in the 2022 midterms, young people will show up and keep those promises that they make. Young Democrats will continue to show up and deliver. The National Committee took care of quite a few pieces of formal business outside of trainings and panels. We officially elected Spencer Dirrig of Ohio Young Democrats as the 3rd Vice President of the Young Democrats of America. We also adopted a sweeping update to the YDA Charter and Bylaws that would modernize and create a more equitable organization across the country. For the first time ever, they chartered the Young Democrats of America officially chartered Young Democrats Abroad representing all young Americans who continue to vote as American Citizens in over 200 countries around the world as YDA continues to represent all young people who identify as Democrats no matter where they are. [We are keeping our promises and we are delivering for our country but we need you to help us out. clean_body: Show your solidarity by giving today | | Derek- We have officially gaveled out of YDA Buffalo and the city of Buffalo and the New York State Young Democrats truly showed us how Buffalo is a Union Town. YDA is keeping our promises in supporting Labor and our Unions and we hope that you can support us. | Many people did not believe that we were going to show up to Buffalo, NY in December but we did. We are showing, just like in the 2022 midterms, young people will show up and keep those promises that they make. Young Democrats will continue to show up and deliver. The National Committee took care of quite a few pieces of formal business outside of trainings and panels. We officially elected Spencer Dirrig of Ohio Young Democrats as the 3rd Vice President of the Young Democrats of America. We also adopted a sweeping update to the YDA Charter and Bylaws that would modernize and create a more equitable organization across the country. For the first time ever, they chartered the Young Democrats of America officially chartered Young Democrats Abroad representing all young Americans who continue to vote as American Citizens in over 200 countries around the world as YDA continues to represent all young people who identify as Democrats no matter where they are. In solidarity, Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Marco Rubio
subject: Frankly, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

Frankly, we're way behind where we need to be. I know it can feel like this happens every month, but we are running out of time to reach our goal. **Our End of Year Deadline is close, and I 'm pleading with you to read this.**

Let me tell you why this End of Year Goal is so important and what your help will go towards.

Democrats were able to stop our massive Red Wave this year after they defeated Herschel Walker. So, I'll be honest, I'm starting to worry about the future of America.

Making a donation today has 2X the impact as donating next year. **We need folks who can chip in today, so that we can build the infrastructure we need to win back America and restore the American Dream.** Donating $25 has the impact of giving $75, donating $50 has the impact of giving $150, and donating $100 has the impact of $300.

I want to be as transparent as possible. When you donate today, your money will go towards stopping the Left, planning our fight to take back the Senate, and doing everything we can to restore the American Dream. That is why your donation this early on is so much more impactful.

**[Please don't ignore this earnest plea, I'm counting on you. Can you please step up and give whatever you can today to help me defend conservative values and put America first?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053217:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "Please don’t
ignore this earnest plea, I’m counting on you. Can you please step up and give whatever you can today to help me defend conservative values and
put America first?")**

| | | [DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053217:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "DONATE
NOW >>")

Thank you for making 2X the impact today by donating early.

Marco Rubio
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053218:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053218:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053218:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053219:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053219:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "If you’re
committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053219:6pY0CVGRN:m:1:3331421248:C3403664A85404531BA607A47CBA34AA:r "STOP THE DEMS")

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It’d be disastrous to have an election denier as the next attorney general of Arizona. We must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes.
body:
Yes, there’s still a recount happening!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30a9c946-5947-421b-8ae3-822ef5d2bb13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_So there’s one more Big Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop._** We didn't only turn the red wave into a blue crush, we defeated almost every one of the loudest election deniers running in 2022. We did it because voters and donors like you stepped up all over the country to make sure Republicans had to press hard for every inch of ground. We conceded nothing without a fight. [_**To finish the job, we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes. This is why your support for the Democratic Attorneys General Association is critical at this time.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadbcec73-a573-451c-ae97-6d651f1726e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. Kari Lake not only refuses to concede, but still spits out lie after lie about "election fraud" that doesn't exist. **Ruby-red Cochise County, AZ had to be sued by current Secretary of State and Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to force them to submit their vote tallies, as they denied a fair election took place by presenting zero evidence and a whole lot of conspiracies.** A second county, Mohave, also initially refused, until the threat of arrest forced the Republican commissioners to back down. _ __And, of course, Hamadeh himself is spewing every conspiracy theory he can conjure up, damaging the faith Arizonans, and all Americans, have in our democratic process._ __So we must be ready for Hamadeh's team to pull out every trick, including trying to alter and/or destroy ballots, engage in ridiculous lawsuits, propaganda and even intimidation--anything they can think of, legal or otherwise--to try and wrest the election away from the 99% certain winner after a legitimate recount, Kris Mayes._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: No election deniers for attorney general**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d92e5d1-cb66-4ecd-a9f8-b976cd11888b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _We can't make Hamadeh have an ounce of class or respect for the Democratic process and shut his mouth. But we can make sure he isn't able to find a way to illegally or unethically win this election, so he can spout this trash while serving as the highest ranking law enforcement office in Arizona._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Democratic Attorneys General Association (DAGA) so they can use these resources to make sure there is a fully aboveboard recount and the legitimate winner--Kris Mayes--ascends to the position of Arizona Attorney General?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe22c2ae-47ac-4ad9-8a80-46cf362a7f82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and **so appreciate** your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks!
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a5cb148-0a39-4ecb-a692-def8decd6cd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: All On The Line
subject: A.G.Holder:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
“If the Court does the right thing, you should have a nine to zero opinion...”
|
---

FIRSTNAME -- A.G. Holder is extremely concerned. He said on “Face the Nation” that the dangerous theory at the core of _Moore v. Harper_ would “put our system of checks and balances at risk” if the Supreme Court sides with extremist Republicans.
As a former attorney general and voting rights expert, A.G. Holder weighed in:[**“If the Court does the right thing, you should have a _nine to zero opinion_ that rejects this notion of this independent state legislature doctrine.”**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55847791/382993013/1243905992?source=20221210_AOTL_F_ehhnews_Actives&refcode=20221210_AOTL_F_ehhnews_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlY2IzODhhLWE3NzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PfNKjIsvWtk9a1Eu6cfa6UFqcLdh0FvHlSbQjxQ8CGA=)
The decision will come down to siding with voters and 100 years of constitutional precedent -- or siding with map manipulators who want to reinstate an unconstitutional gerrymandered map in North Carolina.
The Supreme Court should protect checks and balances in redistricting!
[**_If you agree with A.G. Holder that this should be an easy case for the Supreme Court to decide, add your name to the AOTL petition._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55847792/382993014/-1462679232?source=20221210_AOTL_F_ehhnews_Actives&refcode=20221210_AOTL_F_ehhnews_Actives&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlY2IzODhhLWE3NzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PfNKjIsvWtk9a1Eu6cfa6UFqcLdh0FvHlSbQjxQ8CGA=&emci=b7c2780d-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=8ecb388a-a779-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045) [**_Or chip in below to support AOTL’s mission to protect voting rights nationwide._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55847793/382993015/1243905992?source=20221210_AOTL_F_ehhnews_Actives&refcode=20221210_AOTL_F_ehhnews_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlY2IzODhhLWE3NzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PfNKjIsvWtk9a1Eu6cfa6UFqcLdh0FvHlSbQjxQ8CGA=)

clean_body: “If the Court does the right thing, you should have a nine to zero opinion...” | FIRSTNAME -- A.G. Holder is extremely concerned. He said on “Face the Nation” that the dangerous theory at the core of Moore v. Harper would “put our system of checks and balances at risk” if the Supreme Court sides with extremist Republicans. As a former attorney general and voting rights expert, A.G. Holder weighed in:= The decision will come down to siding with voters and 100 years of constitutional precedent -- or siding with map manipulators who want to reinstate an unconstitutional gerrymandered map in North Carolina. The Supreme Court should protect checks and balances in redistricting! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for your support, AOTL Team All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING NEWS: update on this weekend's IL GOP State Central Committee meeting
body:
The arrogance and belittling was on full display for the hundreds of grassroots supporters in attendance, but you won't believe who voted in WI!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/659dde58aed2/breaking-news-update-on-this-weekends-il-gop-state-central-committee-meeting?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Treasurer to Grassroots During Meeting: "If You Haven't Donated, Then Why Are You Here?" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During a quarterly IL Republican Party State Central Committee (SSC) meeting in Bolingbrook on Saturday, approximately 200 conservative grassroots activists filled the room in a stunning display to publicly share their grievances about the disappointing losses during the November 8th election; the lack of support they received from the party; and demanding that chairman Don Tracy resign.

The GOP leaders were visibly stunned and far outnumbered, with many of the grassroots activists driving more than five hours to attend Saturday’s meeting.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Joining the grassroots were many former GOP candidates, including Lt.Gov. candidate Stephanie Trussell, attorney general candidate Tom DeVore, US Senate candidates Peggy Hubbard and Matt Dubiel, former state senate candidate Christine McGovern, former congressional candidates Ashley Ramos, Rob Cruz, Cathy O’Shea, Jack Lombardi, Nikki Conforti and Jim Marter, and many more.

The meeting was long, with many state central committee members praising Tracy during their committee updates and talking about the “red wave” that the GOP experienced in local races in counties like Gallatin, Coles, Hardin, Jefferson and Marion – counties unfamiliar to most people in the room, including SSC members.

But the most shocking moment of the day occurred when IL GOP Treasurer and chairman of the finance committee Vince Kolber, a multi-millionaire businessman addressed the crowd bragging about how the party raised $2.2 million this cycle (compared to Pritzker spending
** $152 million (https://www.businessinsider.com/dr-oz-jb-pritzker-wealthy-senate-house-congress-elections-2022-11?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
), and then asking the room full of hardworking grassroots conservatives,

“I assume all of you have donated to the IL GOP?”

And when the room yelled back,

“No!”

He replied,
“No, then what are you doing here?”

The belittling and out-of-touch comment drew an immediate reaction from the crowd, still stunned that a GOP leader would say something so offensive to a room full of people where many of them had driven hours, just for their voices to be heard.

And sources confirmed to Illinois Review that Kolber is registered to vote in Wisconsin and voted there on Nov. 8th despite serving as a leader of the IL GOP.
** (https://myvote.wi.gov/en-us/Register-To-Vote?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
A copy of IL GOP Treasurer and Chairman of the Finance Committee Vince Kolber’s voter registration in Wisconsin.

But the shocking moments were not yet over.

Leaping to Kolber’s defense was SSC member and grassroots-supported Jeanne Ives, who screamed,
“This is not your problem! This man gave me $750,000 when I ran against Gov. Bruce Rauner!”

Ives’ burst drew applause from SSC members, including Tracy, but angered the majority of grassroots in the room. Proving a point that Illinois Review has made many times in previous articles, the IL GOP establishment’s obsession with money.

If you don’t
** donate (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, you don’t matter.

And if you donate, you are somehow immune from criticism and can say anything you want.

No wonder the IL GOP can’t win an election – they can’t even win over the grassroots.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=362cc22779-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_11_05_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-362cc22779-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Due to this update, we’re confidentially polling our top 2% of Pennsylvania supporters to know their thoughts on the Covid-19 Booster. Our records indicate that you’re a top thought leader in Pennsylvania. So you’ve been handpicked to take our confidential COVID-19 booster survey. The CDC is recommending the COVID-19 booster for millions of Americans to slow the spread of COVID-19. And now Republicans are working behind the scenes to block Pres. Biden’s agenda and the CDC's critical measures. So we need your input on Biden’s response to COVID-19. — Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Replace Sinema
subject: Bernie is right about this 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Did you see what Senator Bernie Sanders had to say about Kyrsten Sinema leaving the Democratic party? _“She has her reasons. I happen to suspect that it’s probably a lot to do with politics back in Arizona._**_I think the Democrats are not all that enthusiastic about somebody who helps sabotage some of the most important legislation that protects the interests of working families and voting rights and so forth._**_”_ Bernie is right. Sinema quit the party in a craven and calculated move because she knew she would lose the primary. Now we’ll defeat her in a three-way general election instead. Bernie’s also right about this: Sinema has sabotaged some of the most important legislation that President Biden and Democrats in the Senate tried to pass. **** **[Help us defeat Sinema in 2024. Chip in here >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcPv_SFnL0GdGw1lLGmW6ZpU8S2-NtHcZC73ZZQIV-PnxnWsBTIwboDCVw9xYnv17fJWZPHrCsKeCqxgkuT8Y1urV52b_iZHkBOIt8leDtbXLp6sfFKpNjwfs4MwrXIdI6iohfxnsfJgCIB2b7E2zBqbEKOQ0x2u4HlNzYksfhjnhXwyO-QShp3aQXL9QjL-Je0KSzaUbYNbs8uIJH6MQeBrUGue6zGsTC2n9T3VEqiWE3EQ661PaYhteJAvJPblQkSi2fBnz1kxwDaQ2Vs5fFoQ/3rw/u3X-1l9HRVmKcr8yrUYdFA/h0/CyDrIVZrqJ72zpLbg6cxSrGPUQbX-p1d2BlY4suRD90)** Sinema blew up negotiations on Build Back Better. She whittled the infrastructure package down. She limited what we could do on climate change. She prevented us from acting on immigration. We couldn’t get paid family leave or affordable child care done because of her. She did the bidding of Pharma lobbyists to weaken our drug pricing reforms. She inserted special protections for her private equity donors into the Inflation Reduction Act.
Worst of all: Sinema chose the filibuster over restoring abortion rights and passing voting rights legislation. Thankfully, Democrats have still been able to get a lot done these last two years – but it’s all been in spite of Sinema, not because of her. If only Sinema cared half as much about improving the lives of her constituents as she does about making headlines, we’d get a lot more done. **[That’s why we’re working to replace Sinema in 2024–because Arizonans deserve so much better. Chip in now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcPv_SFnL0GdGw1lLGmW6ZpTFz__zHa287M1yFxAYzVDd3kJQBA-DrgWpJKXbeJZdUD8DhR42yyXVpWRbE1EMJof8FDMqqHK2LfekfpDGYYpd7Dcb9d98T_G3f7Zn5QxH60kTkYLgDn4R0KkdHd-brYEOjegbNIEeJnONGe2IEw1MxRdNbPvLbXPvBHbgJeQSwRF0HXSYEwCXO9nRpwFvV_zfyBsXAFTRcDkoE0yM4nhSt1y5lOWhOfIaG_6CGa0GMw3Ojg2iu5S0hcpmgCTMKIw/3rw/u3X-1l9HRVmKcr8yrUYdFA/h1/D_sy9mJ1whFe2_ZB8rT_5R2ZNWXX2ahz3ZvE5j3W67Q)** [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcPv_SFnL0GdGw1lLGmW6ZpehGBKLcISq2xjwbsb77YMPyvZISHTOWlRF4pbPG0P2ttDtNrIroAgnt6Krhjjv-5pSqQjIWB0v054x02-0OuDpGsjchu5NmcS7LS1gqeoEEOhWjGhFfzppbVf6C8cnxQ6oTzslTxbQG9rjGwO86_TGVhbTawfxKfQXeEuKks5qtwdURTiCdKJHnpBoS9hWelHcQVvqqznYaNwp0SJVtI2GJu2mkgdUvqPQGlsDmQeTOhS2wceHcEkr7FJqlER4wrg/3rw/u3X-1l9HRVmKcr8yrUYdFA/h2/yJkPvNidSJzdyhSLD5FViUtqC0DfpIVXz38QFDaMIHY) -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC (formerly “Primary Sinema”)

[ Republicans may target this big COVID-19 topic in the next Congress. The National Emergency Declaration, which was declared early in the pandemic by former President Trump and extended by Biden, could be one of the first things the new congress fights. The National Emergency Declaration was at first used to allow the HHS access to waive requirements for federal health programs to make it easier to serve patients. It also allowed flexibilities in deadlines for filing COBRA claims and flexible spending accounts. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42463%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y1lbSdWxnPoMANIwEe4CtA&sysid=1)

Peter Willis,

and we're celebrating this holiday season with a new Bernie Sanders
ornament!

Revolution for $5 or more, we’ll send you this limited edition Bernie’s
Mittens holiday ornament!

and organize to stand up to corporate power and advance progressive policies in
the year to come.

Who better to embody the spirit of the season than Bernie who has given so much
to our movement. As we head into a new year, let’s remember what “Not me, Us” is
all about and move forward together.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8108?t=1012&akid=3826%2E5885482%2EZ153L2 ]Reserve your special edition Bernie ornament by donating $5 or more monthly!

body:
| | | Team -- Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK Democrats' agenda, and we must _defeat_ his right-wing allies to fight back. **With your support, we can beat these THREE vulnerable Republicans in 2024:**

**[Pitch in $5 now to help defeat all of McConnell and Trump's Senate cronies. They outraised us MULTIPLE times this year and we're _well short_ of hitting our $50,000 fundraising goal -- we can’t let them pull ahead _again_ >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221211-SenateAlert-GOPSlate2024-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221211-SenateAlert-GOPSlate2024-ETG-sl1&akid=9142%2E9716520%2ElnIywF)**

So much progress is hanging in the balance right now.

Mitch McConnell is dead-set on reversing all of President Biden’s accomplishments, and he’s even hinted at holding ANOTHER seat on the Supreme Court hostage if we don't defend our slim Senate majority.

But if we don't keep pace with the GOP's megadonor base, it'll BADLY damage our chances in 2024 against far-right, Trump-supporting Republicans like Rick Scott, Ted Cruz, and Josh Hawley.

This situation is dire: We could fall behind and lose the Senate unless we turn our fundraising around _immediately_!

**We REFUSE to take off-days or abandon our fundraising goals in the face of McConnell’s threats. There is WAY too much at stake, so we'll ask you right now:**

clean_body: | | | Team -- Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK Democrats' agenda, and we must defeat his right-wing allies to fight back. With your support, we can beat these THREE vulnerable Republicans in 2024: | | So much progress is hanging in the balance right now. Mitch McConnell is dead-set on reversing all of President Biden’s accomplishments, and he’s even hinted at holding ANOTHER seat on the Supreme Court hostage if we don't defend our slim Senate majority. But if we don't keep pace with the GOP's megadonor base, it'll BADLY damage our chances in 2024 against far-right, Trump-supporting Republicans like Rick Scott, Ted Cruz, and Josh Hawley. This situation is dire: We could fall behind and lose the Senate unless we turn our fundraising around immediately! We REFUSE to take off-days or abandon our fundraising goals in the face of McConnell’s threats. There is WAY too much at stake, so we'll ask you right now: We need your help to defend our Senate majority. FROM: Peter Willis
SUBJECT: We are with you. Dear Congresswoman Cheney,

I might not agree with you on much, but we both know one thing to be true: _Trump-loving MAGA Republicans are a grave threat to our democracy._

That’s why I’m so thankful for your hard work on the Jan. 6th Commission. **You’ve bucked the corrupt Trump wing of your party to search for the TRUTH – _and I couldn’t be more grateful!_**

[Rep. Cheney, you’re the only Republican willing to stand up to Trump – and I want you to know I’m standing with you against his attacks. That’s why I’m signing this letter with a $1 donation to UniteDemocrats, to stand with you and help them defeat Trump‐loving Republicans »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55846472/382984259/-1927912107?amount=1&amounts=1,3,5,10&refcode=UD_20221211_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZTk4YTY5LThlNzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_b8W2PLNz0sq20XiE9GE6b1QKA6KfSWtYEGdh5d5ni8=) | [SIGN TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY IN HER PURSUIT FOR JUSTICE! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55846475/382984269/-1927912107?amount=1&refcode=UD_20221211_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZTk4YTY5LThlNzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_b8W2PLNz0sq20XiE9GE6b1QKA6KfSWtYEGdh5d5ni8=)
---
Congresswoman Cheney, I know you’ve faced attacks from your party before.

When you called out Donald Trump for inciting the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection, his cronies in Congress responded by _censuring_ your voice. _It was pathetic!_

I know these attacks have made your search for the truth impossibly hard... **but let me assure you, Congresswoman, that good Americans are with you!**

[I won’t let Trump and his MAGA Republicans destroy our democracy – and I know you won’t either, Rep. Cheney. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $1 to UniteDemocrats, to help you both save our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55846478/382984279/-1927912107?amount=1&amounts=1,3,5,10&refcode=UD_20221211_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZTk4YTY5LThlNzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_b8W2PLNz0sq20XiE9GE6b1QKA6KfSWtYEGdh5d5ni8=)
[STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55846483/382984281/-1927912107?amount=1&refcode=UD_20221211_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZTk4YTY5LThlNzktZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_b8W2PLNz0sq20XiE9GE6b1QKA6KfSWtYEGdh5d5ni8=)

Thank you for being on the right side of history.

clean_body: Rep. Liz Cheney + Donald Trump + Peter | [ BREAKING] Republicans Attack Rep. Liz Cheney after Jan. 6th Hearings = = | = FROM: Peter Willis SUBJECT: We are with you. Dear Congresswoman Cheney, I might not agree with you on much, but we both know one thing to be true: Trump-loving MAGA Republicans are a grave threat to our democracy. That’s why I’m so thankful for your hard work on the Jan. 6th Commission. You’ve bucked the corrupt Trump wing of your party to search for the TRUTH – and I couldn’t be more grateful! = | = Congresswoman Cheney, I know you’ve faced attacks from your party before. When you called out Donald Trump for inciting the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection, his cronies in Congress responded by censuring your voice. It was pathetic! I know these attacks have made your search for the truth impossibly hard... but let me assure you, Congresswoman, that good Americans are with you! = = Thank you for being on the right side of history. We’re right here with you. name: Special Election Updates (via DLCC.org)
subject: You are the key to winning these special elections:
body:
We’re less than one month away from the first special election of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. | | |
---
| | **The clock is racing towards the first special elections of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January.** Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why:
* Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a _handful_ of votes.
* And after state Democrats’ historic wins this year, state Republicans will be looking for _any_ power-building opportunities they can find.
* **We’ve been outraised by Republicans every quarter this year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats _today._**

We need grassroots Democrats like you, to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. **Can we count on you today?** [Rush $7 right now to give state Democrats the support they need to secure victories in elections across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_T2zyTQu244Uf_Vel4qq1wxdfmheLTDcuAKS7BB9Yfup8Peo9NUROdo3s4yu3hwGD_6gbPaDj9X1rkZN9PQjemSbOyKVNzsszL0E8vK1M-gOXpsQTzOykKsklNuQJiJtUnNTvf4LywAwx6BtJCUHaI4CKuGWRrvN9TSf5w5gduEAtOFwTiMhHbmPm4ghVguNGsyorkT3oNqo0acbvIYcpohvEkOW6O0d8zl3PhGOI8lvrHUX2TfGHl6pM79Q7drbvl4Dvf8dvsXpbNEs4KLWXa7ubeNJ4WXOzZ_lPOXl7VhZHk1jsPJzD-CRizEc_JBVjSUoDdWBpxMNqVd1gZDcZiVIV-n_xMw76ZhYIDOGFVE9V9yGPOMTkbsrwDB39_ZewGwgc2VSuDeg0O370UNTFbJuyNPOUWAtiR_v7YeIPUb5Cfl2TuuX5FO2jWeARIp2jQdCnnLuWnZDGZ1wX_oauKq3-Lkcojc2TVRSCzk0UN-bRcHVQmC13jiMMasUl8QIFdwC8o9KfZiWIPjr3qFFx8RM-RMNubHSCpZYEFZzOpiNdVmV2O7dRFlh7T1tg3ts/3rw/DO6yIazPTE2gcDwrETqNhg/h0/E88dx7gAmg99_zO7tsaDhG1tC5bg0aJu6DUn1U3h74c) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Democratic majorities aren’t built in a day – or even within a single election cycle. They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. **Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.**
That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today.

clean_body: We’re less than one month away from the first special election of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. | | | | | The clock is racing towards the first special elections of 2023, with critical races already on the books for January. Securing Democratic victories in these elections won’t be easy. Here’s why: Special elections are historically underfunded and rarely receive the attention they deserve – oftentimes, they’re decided by just a handful of votes. And after state Democrats’ historic wins this year, state Republicans will be looking for any power-building opportunities they can find. We’ve been outraised by Republicans every quarter this year – so to compete against state Republicans’ outsized spending, we’ll need a tidal wave of support from grassroots Democrats today. We need grassroots Democrats like you, to help fuel our on-the-ground strategy, hire organizers, build community relationships, and develop a winning platform for our candidates. Can we count on you today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Democratic majorities aren’t built in a day – or even within a single election cycle. They’re the result of long-term organizing, strategic power-building, and targeted investments – even in the “off” season. Securing victories in special elections is a key part of our long-term power-building strategy – these elections could help turn the tide for state Democrats.** That’s why it’s vital that we seize these opportunities and throw our full support behind the incredible Democratic candidates in these elections – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table, so we need your help today. Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country.
