name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I have 10 minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I hope you’ll take the time to read through this email. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55848707/383019426/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221211_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkZGJjYi1iOTc5LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQ2xVNaaAhZMCRyyp6mVA7ixeN2wj6L-AyCIoh7HAyE=&emci=8d94a4f4-1278-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=970ddbcb-b979-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045)
---
I have about 10 spare minutes today, folks. So I want to take this time to share why fighting for New Mexicans in the U.S. Senate means so much to me. I was raised by a union lineman and a factory worker who taught me the value of hard work. I worked my way through college to earn a mechanical engineering degree — where I found my passion for clean energy. I even designed and built a carbon fiber solar-powered car called the “Sun Tiger” with my engineering classmates that we raced across the United States: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55848708/383019429/2040401477?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221211_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkZGJjYi1iOTc5LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQ2xVNaaAhZMCRyyp6mVA7ixeN2wj6L-AyCIoh7HAyE=) My career has spanned from working on directed energy at the Air Force Research Laboratory at Kirtland Air Force Base in Albuquerque, to learning about the importance of conservation work in rural communities as an AmeriCorps fellow, to serving on the Albuquerque City Council, before coming to Congress. I’ve always been focused on delivering results for people and our planet — no matter what job I hold. But continuing my work in the Senate is especially important right now — as we work to protect reproductive rights, act on climate change, support key investments in education, and more. **That’s why it’s so important my campaign meets our mid-month goal this coming week to prepare for the fights ahead and stay on course to reach our public fundraising goal at the end of the month. name: Katie Porter
subject: Doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Our average donation this past year was around $25, and I’m so grateful for everyone who pitched in and helped us hold this important seat.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15543%2E3422442%2Ef4eM5i)
Derek, I’m abundantly proud to say: I “do Congress” differently than most Members.
* I don’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Wall Street Banks.
* I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress and their families from trading stocks.
* When Congress brought back earmarks (which are a way of funding Members’ pet projects) in 2021, I was the only Democrat to oppose them.

But I wouldn’t be here without you. Our average donation this past year was around $25, and I’m so grateful for everyone who pitched in and has allowed me to continue fighting for working people.
Thanks for being on Team Porter,
Katie
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE11_AVG_20221211_V1_F&t=2&akid=15543%2E3422442%2Ef4eM5i)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15543%2E3422442%2Ef4eM5i)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15543%2E3422442%2Ef4eM5i).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, It’s Senator Josh Hawley. I’m getting to work with my fellow patriots in the Senate, and we need your help.

Over the past two years, Joe Biden has done a LOT of damage to our country - and we’re ready to get to work to make it right.

But there’s SO much to tackle. _That’s why I’m turning to you, Peter._

I want your opinion on what issue you think we should handle first, so I put together a survey for my top 100 patriots to fill out and give their input.

[**Let me know now: What do YOU think is the most important issue facing America?**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=49f32b3ab9fd4c32ba434e171077cd16&_e=DypUoiUaqqidT1-qclR3l6icPI2qwi0YTzXduRDFjOJdWIy-xzfbYhbGbu5X5kzGPj68CSw2j7pS5hom1BzKfqJQ5GiGwNj0sJnC98cbxCDqhhiC_79kqaPzrobnrQ4UQ9M_dQEQySe-gq-AwhtXdHQv3UcEl_jtkAX__d8tzWK3I5PME30dCuPtwOsqrnNv0dpnU5ZhI-Hajs-h_rBWobMFR-XQxGz_tm6KKafIT9Wx6w33HvjHC2gEJG1AchwfJfAwfWs8XoiyoTOX0CmEgzG-YIW8Khk4TVTREQ0q9KcUgxG1oCNaCArfX7ILtKnqVpiaXna9VBasvSpuWpW_tQ%3D%3D)

Over the past two years, Joe Biden has done a LOT of damage to our country - and we’re ready to get to work to make it right. But there’s SO much to tackle. That’s why I’m turning to you, Peter. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A win for equal rights 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Everyone should be able to marry the person they love. Period.
#
Peter, this is way overdue:
The House and Senate have _**finally** _passed the Respect for Marriage Act! This is a huge win in our fight to guarantee marriage equality, and I’m so excited to send the Respect for Marriage Act to the President’s desk.
**Love won** when we passed this much-needed legislation.
But even during a year where we’ve witnessed a national wave of extreme homophobic and transphobic legislation and hate crimes, 36 Senate Republicans and 169 House Republicans voted NO on this much-needed legislation. It’s infuriating, and we cannot allow their votes to embolden more discrimination.
**Peter, we need to keep fighting for more legislation that will protect and support our LGBTQ+ community, especially when Republicans take control of the House in January.** [**That starts with supporters like you helping us build a movement big enough to achieve this change. Can you rush a contribution of $3 or more to help us continue to fight for equality?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24810?refcode=em20221211-1947&t=1&akid=1947%2E420207%2EElhUiz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24810?refcode=em20221211-1947&t=20&akid=1947%2E420207%2EElhUiz)**
As the proud mom of a trans kid and someone who is in a loving interracial marriage, passing the Respect for Marriage Act means so much to me personally, and I am proud to be a part of this milestone.
In the aftermath of the devastating mass shooting in Colorado Springs in a beloved LGBTQ+ space, it’s our responsibility to do everything we can to protect LGBTQ+ rights and the young people growing up in America today – and fight for the future they deserve.
As long as I’m in Congress, I will continue to fight with all the power I have for LGBTQ+ equality nationwide. [**Will you donate to support our movement that will keep fighting for dignity, equality, and justice for all?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24810?refcode=em20221211-1947&t=21&akid=1947%2E420207%2EElhUiz)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24810?refcode=em20221211-1947&t=22&akid=1947%2E420207%2EElhUiz)**
Together,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221211-1947-footer&t=23&refcode2=1947_420207_ElhUiz&akid=1947%2E420207%2EElhUiz)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kyrsten Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent right after Democrats across the country were celebrating having a clear, 51-seat majority in the Senate, undermining us all once again. Can you help stiffen Democrats’ resolve to finally challenge her repeated betrayals?
body:
The worst timing
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5045080b-9349-4a13-967c-dbd943f9cd69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **We’re sure you’ve heard, but she's made it official, KYRSTEN SINEMA HAS STABBED EVERY DEMOCRAT IN THE BACK.** **_During one of the biggest weeks of Democratic celebration the past few years—and after Arizona Democratic candidates proved to be the clear choice of the state’s voters for top offices—Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent._ ** _Sinema's counting on our being scared she'll split the vote in 2024 if we run a true Democrat, that we'll sit back and take her betrayal. Don't let her do it. You win not with fear, but leadership. _ _**_Congressman Ruben Gallego is a force, a charismatic, young, progressive Latino veteran, who understands "loyalty" in a way that is alien to Sinema. He's talked about primarying her already for all her betrayals. So let's get him in the race. Not next month or next year. NOW._** _ [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising week for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1943afb8-be8e-4573-8e79-8242ced57fb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Only a response that Democrats won't be held hostage, will support Gallego with all they have while making her into a nobody by stripping her of all Senate power will get this done. She can't caucus with Republicans, or her plan to appeal to some Democrats fails. If she caucuses with nobody, she is a nobody, and we still retain our advantage (50-49-1, instead of 51-49, still enough for us to have a real majority)._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Stand with Ruben Gallego and the Democratic majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56bebc54-1cf0-4970-9fb2-2184e4ff6455/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Even Joe Manchin didn't consult Sinema when he cut a deal with Joe Biden in July. From CNN.com: _Democrats in the Senate know who she is, that it's not about principles or her state's lean (decidedly center left, now), but her._ **_So let's make clear right now she's not taking hostages, has no power and we'll put a real Dem in the Senate in 2024._** [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising week for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1665caff-ab49-4636-ad31-93f8a35e8c2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much for standing for what’s right._
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7020e477-eb29-43bc-ae80-d3ea6a1ec773/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8b3611b-4ae4-4b97-b53c-782772c78dc1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Riley Berg, Country First
subject: 'Tis the season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
We're putting Country over Party

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=1&v=60)
---
**GRASSROOTS UPDATE** Happy Holidays, Friend -- 'Tis the season to put Country over Party! Following November's mid-term elections, the Country First movement has a lot about which to be optimistic. The momentum continues to build and we now have the opportunity in the months ahead to collectively strategize, organize, and amplify our mission to bring Country First to new heights. **In this issue:**
* NEW Holiday merch!
* Next Generation Data Project (for ALL generations!)
* Mending Divisions Volunteer Committee
* Community Voices Initiative
* Member Spotlight
* You+2
* New Volunteer Training
* Book Club

* * *
**NEW! HOLIDAY MERCH******[****](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRHcpXYfjxjxBeZ437P2WI-DIewPMQtVeYNK6MIJrdfO5AHjaH_YZyDIXQ68AQP8ouQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=2&v=60)[****](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRHcpXYfjxjxBeZ437P2WI-DIewPMQtVeYNK6MIJrdfO5AHjaH_YZyDIXQ68AQP8ouQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=3&v=60)[****](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRHcpXYfjxjxBeZ437P2WI-DIewPMQtVeYNK6MIJrdfO5AHjaH_YZyDIXQ68AQP8ouQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=4&v=60)
* * *
**NEXT GENERATION DATA PROJECT** Throughout the country, there are millions of civically engaged college students. To ensure college students get an invitation to engage with Country First, we're creating a database of college professors, administrators, and campus leaders across the country. We are inviting all volunteers to participate in this project by doing the following:
* Click the button below to [access the digital file](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQH93r2tGYCR64PWuONiFqWMHLG2pjVnxCBNWbkJkvsIRz1Fs8c43_M3-9qyaE4hXx48Sx95fZNUawE2Q53XKWfitvt3h4dEEgg1wlzkINmnuC&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=5&v=60) of all 50 states.
* Find your state's spreadsheet, click it, and _request editor access_.
* Upon receiving access, select a school in your state and begin reviewing public information from the university website.

With over 7,000 volunteers across all 50 states, if each volunteer selected one school in their state, the database will be completed in no time. With a new academic semester quickly approaching, now is the time to prepare, collaborate, and work together to invite the Next Generation to join us in putting Country before Party. Researchers, sign up below: | [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQH93r2tGYCR64PWuONiFqWMHLG2pjVnxCBNWbkJkvsIRz1Fs8c43_M3-9qyaE4hXx48Sx95fZNUawE2Q53XKWfitvt3h4dEEgg1wlzkINmnuC&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=6&v=60 "Next Generation Research Project") [Next Generation Research Project](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQH93r2tGYCR64PWuONiFqWMHLG2pjVnxCBNWbkJkvsIRz1Fs8c43_M3-9qyaE4hXx48Sx95fZNUawE2Q53XKWfitvt3h4dEEgg1wlzkINmnuC&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=6&v=60)
---
* * *
**MENDING DIVISIONS VOLUNTEER COMMITTEE**
Want to do more to share the Country First mission and have a passion for building common ground? The Mending Divisions National Volunteer Committee will be expanding its efforts and programming in 2023 and would like to invite all volunteers to join. Joining the committee will allow you to participate in additional mending divisions training programs, plan initiatives, and collaborate with members from across the United States. Change Agents, sign up below:
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=KFozupC4hMau3PknCEub8j9dujt8G8HgOJ3p3sG49naZ08kyA1Vv9CVC3OsURlpT&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=7&v=60 "Join the Mending Divisions Committee") [Join the Mending Divisions Committee](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=KFozupC4hMau3PknCEub8j9dujt8G8HgOJ3p3sG49naZ08kyA1Vv9CVC3OsURlpT&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=7&v=60)
---
* * *
**NEW! MEMBER SPOTLIGHT**
In our second installment, volunteer Lori Escalera shines the spotlight on leaders within our movement to give us greater insight into the names and faces that will grow more familiar to those engaged with Country First. Feel free to reply to this email with suggestions of people you'd like to see interviewed (even if it is you!).

This month, Lori "sat down with" **Andrew Regalado** , the National Grassroots Director of Country First.
[](https://www.country1st.com/spotlight_2212?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=8&v=60 "Read the Member Spotlight") [Read the Member Spotlight](https://www.country1st.com/spotlight_2212?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=8&v=60)
---
* * *
**YOU+TWO**
The Country First movement continues to rapidly expand across the nation. Each month, we have seen larger audiences at state chapter meetings, national training sessions, virtual campfires, and in our online communities. Introducing someone from your network or community to this empowering movement is one of the biggest differences you can make. It is critical for all of us to work together to share the Country First message far and wide and invite others to adopt our mission.
From now on, we encourage you to bring at least two others to any program you attend and to forward our emails to at least two others. You can start by sharing this email, or log on to **[the Action Center](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=B1Wl-9QEt7XiQFZ8vRCVx42mIimLLageKA3UJSztc2M&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=9&v=60) **to see what's happening throughout the movement and utilize your unique recruiter link.
Your unique recruiter link to share:
https://www.country1st.com/opportunity?recruiter_id=91510
* * *
**NEW VOLUNTEER TRAINING**
Each month, we come together to welcome new members and volunteers by hosting a training to go over all things Country First. This training provides a comprehensive overview of our Grassroots Program and provides an opportunity to engage in dialogue with other members from across the country. **The next training will be held on Tuesday, December 20, 2022 at 5:00pm PST / 6:00pm MST / 7:00pm CST / 8:00pm** **EST.** New members, sign up below:
[](https://www.country1st.com/vol12022?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=10&v=60 "Attend New Volunteer Training") [Attend New Volunteer Training](https://www.country1st.com/vol12022?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=10&v=60)
---
* * *
**BOOK CLUB**
The Country First Book Club gathers each month to read a book and discuss the very problems that Country First aims to address. This month’s book is **[_The Big Truth: Upholding Democracy in the Age of the Big Lie_ by Major Garrett and David Becker](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=heodq3ohBAOIdlJZg-UqpFCofydKWdD58YJ9dA_uaydvLJw5xySoY2Ho2rKa7i5GZp0_qPQMuxMaXAaVyeEZ4OvosxwWgSlw0x8PzVaupG0&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=11&v=60)**. The next book club meeting will be held on Thursday, December 29 at 4:00pm PST / 5:00pm MST / 6:00pm CST / 7:00pm EST. Book Lovers, RSVP below:
[](https://www.country1st.com/bc122022?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=12&v=60 "Attend Book Club Meeting") [Attend Book Club Meeting](https://www.country1st.com/bc122022?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=12&v=60)
---
* * *
Want to stay connected and join the conversation? We strongly encourage you to engage with our empowering network in our [Private Troll-Free Facebook Community](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qLNKlsAAN6GQt_CjSeXswXh&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=13&v=60) and [Private Slack Community](https://www.country1st.com/slack?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=14&v=60). Additionally, feel free to respond to this email or reach out to our volunteer team directly at [andrew@country1st.com](mailto:andrew@country1st.com) to let them know how you would like to enhance your volunteer experience.
Cheers!
All things Country First,

Riley Berg
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=15&v=60 "Wear Your Values") [Wear Your Values](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=15&v=60)
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qLNKlsAAN6GQt_CjSeXswXh&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=16&v=60 "Private Facebook Community") [Private Facebook Community](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qLNKlsAAN6GQt_CjSeXswXh&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=16&v=60)
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=20iWOqDLwEfcLKJhIQ2LLC7Qj9FIWOAlDqWLyImboJFiIHCwpOeqd_AUG-av1p_Cpr3IP8PpnRSpP9RECEq0GA6rBINCCn7IfEu_7lnA1t3TJLOZYr8rvyZInAysv1mI&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=17&v=60 "Private Slack Community") [Private Slack Community](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=20iWOqDLwEfcLKJhIQ2LLC7Qj9FIWOAlDqWLyImboJFiIHCwpOeqd_AUG-av1p_Cpr3IP8PpnRSpP9RECEq0GA6rBINCCn7IfEu_7lnA1t3TJLOZYr8rvyZInAysv1mI&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=17&v=60)
---

---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=18&v=60).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december_volunteer_email_nd&n=19&v=60), software for leaders.
